title: T-038 — UI: TEC-021 BOM Detail page with 7 tabs
prompt: Build /technical/boms/[id] page (TEC-021, §7.5) with tabs: Ingredients Tree / Cost Panel / Routing / Process Params / Costs / Versions / Graph / Recipe Sheet — matching prototype tab structure plus final Technical release red-lines. Match `bom_detail_page` prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/bom-detail.jsx:3-60 (page chrome) plus the seven tab components in same file lines 63-603 and apply local red-line overlays from T-083/T-078. RED tests/ui/tec-021-bom-detail.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-021-bom-detail.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: BOM detail with 7 tabs (Ingredients Tree, Cost Panel, Routing, Process Params, Costs, Versions, Graph, Recipe Sheet).
pipeline_inputs.details: Each tab is a Client/Server Component split. Versions tab links to T-040 diff view. Graph tab uses lightweight DAG renderer (e.g., reactflow) — keep behind dynamic import. Add release/bundle visibility: shared release badge, linked factory_spec release card, clone-on-write banner for released edits, RM usability summary panel, and NCR/review event hints for blocked components.
acceptance_criteria: Given the BOM detail renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/bom-detail.jsx:3-60 and the seven tab components at lines 63-152, 154-206, 209-249, 252-307, 310-370, 373-468, 471-544, 551-603, then tab order, header, and primitives match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL counting tabs and asserting layout sections.
Given user clicks 'Versions' tab, when fired, then version timeline renders and includes a 'View diff' link per pair.
Given user lacks technical.bom.approve, when on Versions tab, then 'Approve' action is hidden.
Given BOM has co_products, when on Ingredients Tree tab, then they are rendered with byproduct flag.
Given BOM is released/approved, when user starts editing, then UI shows clone-on-write banner and routes to draft version creation rather than in-place edit.
Given paired factory_spec is not approved_for_factory/released, then BOM detail shows factory_spec blocker and factory-use action is disabled.
Given RM usability report has blockers, then Ingredients Tree tab shows blocker badges and remediation links from validateRmUsability.

UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
test_strategy: RED tests for parity + tab order + RBAC.
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
risk_red_lines: Do not collapse tabs into a single accordion.
Do not show Approve/Release without paired factory_spec status.
Do not keep FA/PR copy except legacy imported values.
